summary: The AI landscape is rapidly evolving with significant developments in robotics, research, and enterprise applications. Companies like Apple and Google are making strategic moves, while startups are raising substantial funds to advance AI technologies.
insight: The increasing adoption of AI is leading to a convergence of technologies, with companies like NVIDIA and Google DeepMind pushing the boundaries of AI capabilities, from robotics to bioresilience.
highlights: Agility Robotics opens a new training center for its Digit robots in California.
Apple files a trade secrets lawsuit against OpenAI, potentially disrupting its IPO plans.
NVIDIA introduces new Jetson Thor computers to advance mainstream robotics and edge AI.

articles.description: Hyundai aims to deploy 25,000 Atlas robots starting with US factories in 2028.
